'''鈭歱-ch-p-dh''' ('''kapachpedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brave|brave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brave|brave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-ch-p-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kapachpedhoko
|}
